text:
On Wednesday 27 August 2008 22:36:36 comperr comperr wrote:
> kern/121305

Yes, do believe it is.  Although it is a different motherboard we have the 
same nForce chipset...  The patch does fix problems with SATA but some 
intermittent problems with IDE still remain (I cannot even reproduce the 
problems).  

P.S. The problem is that sometimes one of my CD-ROMs on IDE does not get 
detected
